CVE-2023-48161.title: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in GifLib Project GifLib v.5.2.1 al ...
CVE-2023-48161.description: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in GifLib Project GifLib v.5.2.1 allows a local attacker to obtain sensitive information via the DumpSCreen2RGB function in gif2rgb.c
CVE-2023-48161.notes: Crash in CLI tool, no security impact.
